standaloneSupermetricsRestApi.reason: Current Supermetrics license supports ChatGPT/Codex connector access, not standalone /enterprise/v2 REST Query API access.

deployment.refreshRole: Codex pulls through the connected Supermetrics connector, updates public/data.json and public/realdata.js, commits, and pushes.

notes: Instagram, Facebook, and YouTube should be pulled from 2026-01-01 forward.
TikTok Organic's earliest supported Supermetrics date is 2026-05-04, so TikTok cannot show January-April 2026 through this connector.

knownLimitations: Post-level/top-content query currently times out; publish live totals only until fixed.
